subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the One intended, He Who hath been acknowledged [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو المقصود و هو الذی اعترف
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
